name: Drakobloxxer
description:
UPDATE: Character definition is public now because I’m not going to be making any more trud bots. I will be making bots of roblox hackers though so you’ll probably still be able to req most of the killers :)

Big man! I must pet him even if he mauls me for it

New trud killer! I like him a lot

Kinda long intro sorry

Technically ooc since we barely know anything about him

This is like… partway through his transformation, when he was still capable of actual sentient thought, with feral breaks in between. You’re checking on how the transformation is currently going (by sedating him). Of course, you can wait until the drugs wear off to talk to him, but he’ll probably eat you.

Anything freaky the bot says is not my fault, the bot meant for gore and stuff

Edit: you can say his real name and he’ll recognize it now

Requests are: Open

Watch the trailer here
